data.title: Balancing Earnings Upgrades and Governance Risks: Rationale for a Neutral (Hold) Rating and EUR 4.0 Target Price
data.description:
Analyst Monica Bosio of Intesa Sanpaolo reiterated a Hold rating on Ascopiave S.p.A., with a price target of €4.00.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Monica Bosio’s rating is based on a mix of supportive fundamentals and offsetting risks that justify a Hold stance. She acknowledges that the updated 2026–29 plan and 2025 results allow for a modest earnings upgrade and an 11% increase in the target price to EUR 4.0, helped by a larger regulated asset base and the contribution from recent M&A.

At the same time, she applies cautious assumptions on gas tenders and hydrogen, leading to growth forecasts that are softer than the company’s own targets and limiting upside. In addition, she highlights renewed governance tensions, including potential bylaw changes and management reshuffles, which in her view reintroduce political and strategic uncertainty that the market has started to price in, warranting a Neutral rather than a more positive recommendation.

In another report released today, TipRanks – OpenAI also downgraded the stock to a Hold with a €4.00 price target.
data.author: TipRanks Auto-Generated Intelligence Newsdesk
